title: Turn My Swag On
lyrics: took a look in tha mirror said wassup,
I hopped up out tha bed,
took a look in tha mirror said wassup,
its ma time to turn it up
i put my team on, did ma theme song
now its time to turn it up
i got a question why they hattin on me,
i got a question why they hattin on me
i aint did nuthin to em, but count this money
and put my team on, got my whole clique stunnin
when i was 9 years old, i put it in ma head
that ima die for this gold
took a look in tha mirror said wassup,
i hopped up out tha bed,
took a look in tha mirror said wassup,
i know a lot of yall thought i wasn't coming back.....
i had to prove them wronggggg,
got back in tha studio and came up with another hit
I told the world my story, the world where im from
souljaboy X L dot com, boy wassup
now everytime you see me spit,
every time you hear me rhyme,
everytime you see me in your state or town
took a look in tha mirror said wassup,
I hopped up out tha bed,
took a look in tha mirror said wassup,
